original: You are surrounded by clinging, aphrodisiac gas!
You don’t have anyone to use this on right now.
"+d.m.capitalize(u.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(u.isPlural||u.isPlayer()?"are":"is")+" caught in the explosion of pink mist!

"+d.m.capitalize(u.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(u.isPlural?"are":"is")+" caught in the explosion, but due to wearing airtight armor, "+u.getCombatPronoun("s")+" "+(u.isPlural?"are":"is")+" unaffected by the pink fog of lust!

Any thrown object in a fight that looks small and round would send anyone hustling for cover, but not [sophora.nameKnown|Sophora|this Jumper]. No, she knows that what you’ve thrown isn’t immediately dangerous; it’s obvious from your own lack of urgency; however, as you see her eyes flicker like the console of a supercomputer crunching a gorillion numbers, a diffusing, plum-pink mist hisses out from the sphere, swirling in the vicinity! Chemical warfare is no less than what a pirate deserves. She plants an arm over her face, bites down, and leaps from the cloud of lust toxin, holding her breath until the erotic aerosol abates. “Krhh...” She hacks, looking slightly disoriented. Don’t count your chickens: her ire smolders anew.
"+d.m.capitalize(u.getCombatName(),!1)+" "+(u.isPlural||u.isPlayer()?"have":"has")+" no reaction to the pink mist.
